items.title: NFL, NFLPA have yet to begin "formal negotiations" on CBA extension

items.title: Mohammad Saleem added to Afghanistan squad for India ODIs
items.summary: Rashid Khan will link up with the ODI squad directly in Dharamsala, while Mohammad Nabi, with the squad already, is unwell
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
